scenario: Valid scenario: the sole trader files personally (applicantIsTrader), has an EGN so applicantBirthPlace/applicantPermanentAddress are omitted, consents to electronic delivery of any refusal/instructions so the postal-delivery fields are omitted, and does not make the optional VAT election. Hairdressing services, Sofia. No license/permit/qualification-certificate attachments provided (not a regulated activity for this scenario).

fields.registeredSeatAddress: България, София-град, Столична, София, 1000, ж.к. Център, ул. Граф Игнатиев, №15, бл. 2, вх. А, ет. 3, ап. 8
